title: Heteranthocidium ionopterum
taxonomy: Heteranthocidium ionopterum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant is native to the Andes mountains in South America. As a member of the Ericaceae family, Heteranthocidium ionopterum is part of the order Ericales. Further classification places Heteranthocidium ionopterum within the genus Heteranthocidium, a monotypic genus of flowering plants. At the most general level, Heteranthocidium ionopterum is a member of the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Heteranthocidium ionopterum is a plant species that has garnered interest due to its potential medicinal properties. Unfortunately, there is limited information available on its specific uses and applications. As research on this species is scarce, it is not possible to determine its medicinal uses with certainty.
